error_signature: No fields - item(s) exist, but they’re empty
title: Empty fields error in code node execution
symptom: After testing the code node, the error 'No fields - item(s) exist, but they’re empty' appears, despite visible values when editing the node.
applies_when: Input data is present but not accessible
not_this_if: Node is connected to a trigger and executed properly
root_cause: The error occurs when the code node is not receiving the expected input data due to misconfiguration or lack of connection to a preceding node that provides the necessary data.
fix_steps: Ensure the code node is connected to a preceding node that outputs data.
Enable 'Include Other Input Fields' in the code node settings to access previous node data.
agent_instruction: Connect the code node to a preceding node and enable 'Include Other Input Fields'.
